options.name: --comment
options.description: Comment to be saved inside description file

options.name: --descrease-is-regression
options.description: Report also size descrease as regression

options.name: --entry
options.description: Process only entries matching regex PATTERN

options.name: --flat
options.description:
Display flat comparison of entries, without
showing comparison of their content

options.name: --keep-uncompressed-assemblies
options.description: Save LZ4 uncompressed assemblies to temporary files

options.name: --test-apk-size-regression
options.description: Check whether apk size increased more than BYTES

options.name: --test-assembly-size-regression
options.description:
Check whether any assembly size increased more
than BYTES

options.name: --test-apk-percentage-regression
options.description:
Check whether the apk size increased by more than
PERCENT

options.name: --test-content-percentage-regression
options.description:
Check whether any individual file size increased
by more than PERCENT

options.name: --save-descriptions
options.description:
Save .[apk|aab]desc description files next to the
package(s) or to the specified path

options.name: --save-description-1
options.description:
Save .[apk|aab]desc description for first package
to PATH

options.name: --save-description-2
options.description:
Save .[apk|aab]desc description for second package
to PATH

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Output information about progress during the run
of the tool
